title: Bergen Heavy Rain
lead: Bergen is experiencing extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.29. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 89% and Vento of 2.9 km/h. 
 The HDD is 12.5 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands. 
 The CDD is 0.0 GG, showing no impact on cooling demands.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
